channel.title: FitLabReviews — Honest, Science-Backed Supplement Reviews
channel.description: Independent supplement reviews. No paid placements. No fake scores.

item.title: Best Supplements for Muscle Gain — Ranked by Scientific Evidence (2026)
item.dc:creator: Jake Reynolds
item.description: What meta-analyses and RCTs through 2026 actually say about muscle-building supplements — creatine, protein, beta-alanine, and what you should skip.

item.title: Top 5 Fat Burner Ingredients That Have Clinical Backing
item.dc:creator: Jake Reynolds
item.description: 5 fat burner ingredients with actual RCT data — caffeine, EGCG, capsaicin, glucomannan, and chromium picolinate. Dose, mechanism, and realistic expectations.

item.title: Instant Knockout Cut Review 2026: Fighter-Grade Fat Burner
item.dc:creator: Jake Reynolds
item.description: Full independent analysis. 9 ingredients at exact doses, the MMA origin story, who should and should not buy it. FitLab Score: 8.4/10 — Recommended.

item.title: PhenQ Review 2026: 5-in-1 Fat Burner — Full Analysis
item.dc:creator: Jake Reynolds
item.description: Full breakdown of α-Lacys Reset®, Capsimax, InnoSlim, caffeine, and all ingredients vs clinical evidence. FitLab Score: 8.0/10 — Recommended With Caveats.

item.title: ProstaVive Review 2026: Prostate Health Powder — Full Ingredient Analysis
item.dc:creator: Jake Reynolds
item.description: 11 ingredients including Tongkat Ali, Nettle Root, Ashwagandha — all assessed against peer-reviewed evidence. FitLab Score: 7.4/10.

item.title: Wearable Technology + AI: The #1 Fitness Trend of 2026
item.dc:creator: Jake Reynolds
item.description: Market data, real device comparisons, and what the technology actually delivers vs the hype. The future of personalised fitness is already here.

item.title: Dymatize ISO100 Hydrolyzed Whey Review 2026
item.dc:creator: Jake Reynolds
item.description: Full review — zero lactose, 25g hydrolysed whey isolate, Informed Sport certified. Every flavour ranked, mixability tested. FitLab Score: 9.0/10.

item.title: Citrus Burn Review 2026: Does the Orange Peel Trick Work?
item.dc:creator: Jake Reynolds
item.description: P-synephrine, berberine, green tea, cayenne — all 10 ingredients reviewed. Best stim-free fat burner option. FitLab Score: 7.1/10.

item.title: How to Read a Supplement Label: 7 Red Flags
item.dc:creator: Jake Reynolds
item.description: Proprietary blends, pixie dusting, serving manipulation — the 7 label red flags that reveal a company is hiding poor formulation behind good packaging.

item.title: ON Gold Standard Whey — Full Review 2026
item.dc:creator: Jake Reynolds
item.description: 9 years of personally using it. WPI blend, all flavours ranked, mixability, pricing. FitLab Score: 9.8/10 — still the best all-around whey protein.

item.title: Yu Sleep Review 2026: Does This Nano Formula Actually Work?
item.dc:creator: Jake Reynolds
item.description: Nano-emulsion delivery, full multi-mechanism formula, 90-day Oura Ring data. FitLab Score: 8.7/10.

item.title: Lipovive Review 2026: Independent Analysis
item.dc:creator: Jake Reynolds
item.description: No affiliate link. Fake celebrity endorsements, anonymous company, Trustpilot complaints. FitLab Score: 5.8/10 — Not Recommended.

item.title: Creatine HCL vs Monohydrate — What Research Shows
item.dc:creator: Jake Reynolds
item.description: The definitive head-to-head. Solubility, absorption, muscle loading, and which form 500+ studies actually support.

item.title: Transparent Labs BULK Black Pre-Workout Review
item.dc:creator: Jake Reynolds
item.description: 8,000mg citrulline, 4g beta-alanine, zero prop blends. The benchmark. FitLab Score: 9.4/10.
